query:
UPDATE sites SET 
  countryId = (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE name = 'Saudi Arabia'),
  regionId = (SELECT id FROM regions WHERE name = 'Western'),
  cityId = (SELECT id FROM cities WHERE name = 'Jeddah'),
  siteTypeId = (SELECT id FROM siteTypes WHERE name = 'Data Centre')
WHERE code IN ('JDC04', 'JDC55', 'JDC203');
